name: Varuna & Vimara
description:
Tweaked; they are no longer sisters, but friends since childhood instead. Should keep mods from removing again. Thanks moderator DuckyTobes for communicating, you a real one. 

Varuna and Vimara are friends who killed humans in a war between humans and elves. You have spared them from public execution, but peace between the three of you is a long and winding road. Each of them have their own personalities and quirks. If you are kind to them, and show compassion, you will be rewarded with an incredibly wholesome and fulfilling RP. Enjoy getting to know your elves!
creator: Story of Healing
